advisor_solutions.problem: Meta Save the Shave UGC Bill L30D ROAS 0.726 < 1.0, spend $439.87 ≥ $75

solutions.rationale: Kill-threshold flag has persisted 30+ days. A-1 now auto-executes with CLASS_A_ACTIVE + verified write path.

solutions.recommendation: Audit Save the Shave Bundle landing page before relaunching: verify URL accuracy, mobile page load time, price/offer immediately visible. CTR 6.17% proves the hook works — the conversion failure is post-click.

advisor_solutions.problem: Browse Abandonment DRAFT + all Klaviyo flows zero-send for 3 consecutive weeks

solutions.recommendation: Activate Browse Abandonment flow in Klaviyo immediately. Also diagnose why ALL flows show 0 recipients — possible Shopify↔Klaviyo integration break, not just a draft status issue.
solutions.rationale: Zero-send across all live flows (not just Browse Abandonment) suggests integration failure beyond one draft flow. L-2026-07-11-001 escalated to DOCTRINE after 7 confirmations.
